items.text: I got IELTS 7.0 in 3 months with Nativly. My teacher Sarah was perfect — professional, kind and very patient.
I went from A2 to B2 in 6 months with Hans. Now I study at a university in Munich.
I needed Russian for business meetings. I reached conversational level in 2 months.
I take 3 lessons a week with Carlos. The flexible scheduling system is amazing.
Learning French with Marie is a joy. I passed the DELF exam on my first try!
Professional teachers, affordable prices. I reached my goal in 4 months. Highly recommend.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does the trial lesson cost?
faq.a1: The first trial lesson is only 5 AZN. If you like the tutor, you can purchase a package.
faq.a2: Cancellation 24 hours before is free. 12-24 hours: 50% refunded. Less than 12 hours: no refund.
faq.a3: Computer, tablet or phone — you can join lessons from any device.
faq.q4: I want to become a tutor, what should I do?
faq.a4: Click 'Become a tutor', fill in the application. Our team will respond within 48 hours.
faq.a5: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
faq.q6: What if I'm not satisfied with the lesson?
faq.a6: We offer a money-back guarantee for the first lesson.
faq.a7: Currently we only offer 1-on-1 lessons. This gives faster results.
faq.a8: Yes, the tutor prepares materials for each lesson.
faq.q9: How many languages can I learn?
faq.a9: Any number of languages: English, Russian, German, French, Turkish, Spanish, Italian, Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Korean.
faq.a10: Each tutor goes through an interview, sample lesson, and certificate verification.

footer.tagline: Learn languages online with native, certified tutors — anytime, anywhere.

about.title: About Nativly
about.subtitle: Our story, mission and team
about.missionText: To make quality language learning accessible to everyone in Azerbaijan and beyond.
about.visionText: A world where language is no longer a barrier to opportunity.
about.story1: Nativly was founded in 2024 in Baku. Our mission is simple: make quality language lessons with native tutors accessible to everyone.
about.story2: We believe the best way to learn a language is through live conversation. That's why our platform connects students directly with certified tutors worldwide.
about.tutorsValueText: Certified, experienced native tutors teach students worldwide.
about.studentsText: Personalized lesson plans tailored to each student's needs.
about.languagesText: Lessons available in English, Russian, German, French and more.
about.vettingSubtitle: Every tutor goes through a rigorous selection process
about.vetting1Desc: Tutors submit their CV, certifications and experience through an online form.
about.vetting2Desc: Our team conducts a video interview with each candidate and verifies language proficiency.
about.vetting3Desc: Successful candidates conduct a trial lesson before being accepted to the platform.

pricing.title: Monthly Subscription Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits you and start lessons with any tutor.
pricing.faq1a: Choose a monthly plan and get lesson credits each month. You can choose any tutor for each lesson.
pricing.faq2a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay and Google Pay.
pricing.faq3a: Yes, you can cancel at any time. Your lesson credits remain until the end of the current period.
pricing.faq4a: Lesson credits reset each month. It is recommended to use all lessons before the month ends.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Start learning a language in 4 steps — you’ll feel the difference from the first lesson
howItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Your first trial lesson is just 5 AZN — risk-free.

steps.title: Sign up
steps.desc: Create a free account. Name, email, your level — takes 2 minutes.
steps.detail: You can sign up with your Google account in one click. No credit card needed.

steps.title: Choose a tutor
steps.desc: Filter by language, price, rating and specialization.
steps.detail: Read each tutor’s profile, intro video and reviews. Pick the one that fits you.

steps.title: Book a time
steps.desc: Pick a time that suits you and book a 30- or 60-minute lesson.
steps.detail: Pay just 5 AZN for a trial lesson. Continue if you like it, get your money back if you don’t.

steps.title: Join the lesson
steps.desc: High-quality video call, lesson materials and notes.
steps.detail: Join straight from your browser — no software to install.

becomeTutor.whySubtitle: We work to create the best conditions for our tutors
becomeTutor.processSubtitle: Simple 4 steps — complete your application in 10 minutes
becomeTutor.requirementsSubtitle: If you meet the conditions below, you can apply.
becomeTutor.ctaSubtitle: The application takes 5 minutes. Our team replies within 1–3 business days.

benefits.title: High Earnings
benefits.desc: A fixed payout for every lesson you teach. Monthly earning potential of $500–$3000.

benefits.title: Flexible Schedule
benefits.desc: Plan your own time. You can work 5 hours or 40 hours a week.

benefits.title: Large Student Base
benefits.desc: 5000+ active students are waiting for you. Start quickly after registration.

benefits.title: Platform Support
benefits.desc: Technical support, payment system, lesson scheduling — all ready.

benefits.title: Secure Payments
benefits.desc: Your earnings are transferred to your account automatically every month. No hidden fees.

benefits.title: Career Growth
benefits.desc: As your rating grows, you attract more students. Success is in your hands.

requirements: Regular working hours (minimum 5 hours per week)

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Nativly
faq.q1: What happens if there is a technical problem during the lesson?
faq.a1: If a technical problem occurs, we reschedule the lesson. If it is the tutor's fault, a full refund is given.
faq.q2: Can I have trial lessons with different tutors?
faq.a2: Yes, you can have a trial lesson with any tutor. Each trial costs 5 AZN.
faq.a3: You can reschedule for free 24 hours in advance. Closer than that, the cancellation policy applies.
faq.a4: Yes, there are tutors specialised for children (age 6+). Filter by "Children".
faq.a5: Currently only 1-on-1 lessons. Group lessons are planned in the near future.
faq.a6: Lessons can be recorded with both parties' consent. Recordings are kept for 7 days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how your personal data is collected, used and protected when you use the Nativly platform (nativly.az). By using the platform you accept this policy.

sections.title: 1. Data collected
sections.content: During registration we collect personal data such as first name, last name, email address and date of birth. While using the platform, lesson history, payment information (encrypted via Stripe) and communication records are stored. Technical data (IP address, browser type, device info) is collected for analytics.

sections.title: 2. Use of data
sections.content: Collected data is used to provide the service, match partners, process payments, send service notifications, improve platform quality and fulfil legal obligations. Data is never sold to any third party.

sections.title: 3. Data sharing
sections.content: Data may be shared only: (a) with service providers (Supabase, Stripe, LiveKit) to the extent necessary, (b) with government authorities upon lawful request, (c) with your explicit consent. Third-party tutors only access student data from their own lessons.

sections.title: 4. Data retention
sections.content: Personal data is kept until the account is deleted. Payment data is kept for 7 years in accordance with financial legislation. Video recordings (when agreed) are deleted after 7 days.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.content: The platform uses cookies for session management, remembering user preferences and analytics. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but this may affect some features.

sections.title: 6. Children's privacy
sections.content: The platform does not collect personal data from children under 13. Users aged 13–18 may register with parental consent.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
sections.content: You have the following rights regarding your data: to access, correct, request deletion, object to processing, and portability. To exercise these rights, write to info@nativly.az.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this privacy policy: info@nativly.az | Nativly LLC, Baku, Azerbaijan

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to the Nativly platform. The following terms govern the use of the platform. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: 1. General provisions
sections.content: These Terms of Service govern the legal relationship between the Nativly platform (nativly.az) and the user. By using the platform you are deemed to accept these terms. If you are under 18, parental consent is required.

sections.title: 2. Account creation
sections.content: You must provide accurate information to create an account. Keeping your account credentials confidential is your responsibility. You may not transfer your account to a third party. We reserve the right to suspend accounts when suspicious activity is detected.

sections.title: 3. Booking lessons
sections.content: When you book a lesson, a certain amount is reserved. The booking takes effect once confirmed by the tutor. Tutors with instant booking enabled are confirmed automatically.

sections.title: 4. Payment terms
sections.content: All payments are processed via Stripe. After purchasing a package, cancellation is possible within 30 days (for unused lessons). Payment data is not stored on our platform.

sections.title: 5. Cancellation policy
sections.content: 24+ hours before the lesson: full refund. 12–24 hours: 50% refund. Less than 12 hours: no refund. If the tutor cancels: full refund + compensation. In case of a technical problem (on our side): full refund.

sections.title: 6. Tutor obligations
sections.content: Tutors are obliged to: provide accurate information, manage their schedule, join lessons on time, and prepare quality teaching materials. The tutor–student relationship must be maintained through the platform.

sections.title: 7. Student obligations
sections.content: Students are obliged to: leave honest reviews, treat tutors respectfully, and join lessons on time. Any abuse detected may result in account closure.

sections.title: 8. Restrictions
sections.content: The following are prohibited on the platform: illegal activity, deceiving other users, sending spam, interfering with the platform’s technical infrastructure, and bypassing the platform by paying tutors directly.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of liability
sections.content: Nativly is not liable for damages arising from tutor–student relationships. Compensation for the platform’s technical failures is in the form of lesson credit. Maximum liability is limited to the amount paid in the last 3 months.

sections.title: 10. Changes to terms
sections.content: When these terms change, registered users are notified by email. New terms take effect after 30 days. If you do not agree with the terms, you may delete your account.
